records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, did you call just me again at this hour?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, did you call just me again at this hour?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, did you call just me again at this hour?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to do that thing again, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to do that thing again, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to do that thing again, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Loosening up all those stiff spots that've locked up...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Loosening up all those stiff spots that've locked up...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Loosening up all those stiff spots that've locked up...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know. A massage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know. A massage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know. A massage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? When I talk, I should always put the subject first...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? When I talk, I should always put the subject first...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? When I talk, I should always put the subject first...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really get it, but anyway, where do you want me to work on this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really get it, but anyway, where do you want me to work on this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really get it, but anyway, where do you want me to work on this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A lifetime contract?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A lifetime contract?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A lifetime contract?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain. I'm a pirate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain. I'm a pirate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain. I'm a pirate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Signing some flimsy piece of paper like this isn't going to bind me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Signing some flimsy piece of paper like this isn't going to bind me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Signing some flimsy piece of paper like this isn't going to bind me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You swear that'll never happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You swear that'll never happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You swear that'll never happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-That a strong pirate like me can't be tied down, and you just wanted me by your side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-That a strong pirate like me can't be tied down, and you just wanted me by your side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-That a strong pirate like me can't be tied down, and you just wanted me by your side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha! You could've just said that sooner! You had me all embarrassed, working myself up and growling for nothing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha! You could've just said that sooner! You had me all embarrassed, working myself up and growling for nothing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha! You could've just said that sooner! You had me all embarrassed, working myself up and growling for nothing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know this already, Captain, but my goal is to become the great pirate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know this already, Captain, but my goal is to become the great pirate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know this already, Captain, but my goal is to become the great pirate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sailing the seas, creating countless legends... And being recognized by everyone as the great pirate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sailing the seas, creating countless legends... And being recognized by everyone as the great pirate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sailing the seas, creating countless legends... And being recognized by everyone as the great pirate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sailing with you, I've come to realize a lot of things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sailing with you, I've come to realize a lot of things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sailing with you, I've come to realize a lot of things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That on my own... I can't make it through that dark sea, not even a step ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That on my own... I can't make it through that dark sea, not even a step ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That on my own... I can't make it through that dark sea, not even a step ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'm going to become a great pirate... Captain, I need your help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'm going to become a great pirate... Captain, I need your help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'm going to become a great pirate... Captain, I need your help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need some paper contract like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need some paper contract like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need some paper contract like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because I've already made up my mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because I've already made up my mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I've already made up my mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me come aboard, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let me come aboard, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let me come aboard, Captain.
